financial.note: Collaboration with LINE BK for 'Gold for Cash' digital pawn services expands customer reach and credit access.
Major provider of working capital for gold inventory; rising interest rates increase the cost of carry for high-value stock.

supply_chain.note: AURA's selling and buyback prices are directly pegged to the association's daily fixings.
A large portion of Aurora's 800+ branches are located in high-traffic shopping malls; foot traffic correlates with sales.
Disney-themed gold collections target younger demographics and drive high-margin 'Design Gold' segment sales.

equity_cross_holdings.entity: Thong Ma Ngern Pai Co., Ltd.

competitors.note: Competes in the secured lending/pawn market; sector rotation between pure retail and distressed lending.
Competes in the premium diamond jewelry segment, though AURA focuses more on 96.5% gold.
Direct competition for 'pawn-style' liquidity in the lower-to-middle income segment.

macro_commodity_factors.logic: Increases the valuation of existing inventory and drives speculative buying/selling volume.
Local gold prices are calculated based on USD spot; a weaker THB inflates the local price per 'baht' weight.
Increases cost of funds for the 'Gold for Cash' lending business and reduces consumer discretionary spending on luxury items.
